summary: OpenNori CLI no longer generates subjective product semantics from built-in templates or word lists. Draft now requires a Skill-prepared --brief; discover and brainstorm require Skill-prepared --questions/--candidates; default criteria, discovery gap pattern lists, built-in brainstorm candidates, next candidate goals, and hard high-risk strong/weak evidence lists were removed. The remaining CLI validation is structural state integrity and deterministic routing, while packaged Skills and the agent/user conversation own AC discovery, brainstorm directions, next-loop NoriBrief preparation, AC quality review, and subjective evidence sufficiency.

sources.label: ac-a-12-skill-owned-subjective-semantics
sources.summary: Architecture Baseline alignment context. This is not Product AC evidence by itself.

sources.label: rg -n 'PRODUCT_EVIDENCE_SOURCE_TYPES|strong-evidence-required|DEFAULT_CRITERIA|DISCOVERY_GAPS|BRAINSTORM_CANDIDATES|draft --goal|--from-discovery|--from-brainstorm|--from-next-candidate|NextGoalCandidate' src test plugins/opennori/skills README.md .opennori/protocol.md AGENTS.md
sources.command: rg -n 'PRODUCT_EVIDENCE_SOURCE_TYPES|strong-evidence-required|DEFAULT_CRITERIA|DISCOVERY_GAPS|BRAINSTORM_CANDIDATES|draft --goal|--from-discovery|--from-brainstorm|--from-next-candidate|NextGoalCandidate' src test plugins/opennori/skills README.md .opennori/protocol.md AGENTS.md

reviewability: Run the listed typecheck, Vitest, and rg commands; inspect the referenced CLI/domain modules to verify Skill-prepared inputs are required and subjective generators were removed; inspect packaged Skills and docs for agent-owned subjective review behavior.
limitations: Compatibility surfaces such as acceptance_review and negative candidate_goals assertions remain to help downstream agents/review tools understand the boundary. This evidence does not evaluate whether a future agent asks ideal questions; Skills and user approval still govern that subjective quality.
